meaning: n.无边女帽,童帽,烟囱帽,阀帽
examples: Welcome to sit on my bonnet!
The woman moved nearer to him and peered under his bonnet keenly and closely.
The clerk stared at him and the rusty black bonnet a moment, and then laughed.
Hedge fund zillionaire Seth Klarman has the same Bernanke bee in his bonnet.
It is understood she died after coming off the bonnet and hitting a lamppost.
